attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ADJUSTED_CAPACITY, 
 ADJUSTED_COST, 
 ADJUSTED_RATE, 
 ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST, 
 ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS, 
 ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT, 
 ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT, 
 ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG, 
 ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG, 
 ASSET_ID, 
 BASIC_RATE, 
 BONUS_RULE, 
 BOOK_TYPE_CODE, 
 CAPITALIZE_FLAG, 
 CEILING_NAME, 
 CONVERSION_DATE, 
 COST, 
 COST_CHANGE_FLAG, 
 DATE_EFFECTIVE, 
 DATE_INEFFECTIVE, 
 DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE, 
 DEPRECIATE_FLAG, 
 DEPRN_METHOD_CODE, 
 DEPRN_START_DATE, 
 EOFY_ADJ_COST, 
 EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR, 
 FORMULA_FACTOR, 
 FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER, 
 GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
 GLOBAL_NAME, 
 GROUP_ASSET_ID, 
 IDLED_FLAG, 
 ITC_AMOUNT, 
 ITC_AMOUNT_ID, 
 ITC_BASIS, 
 LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
 LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
 LIFE_IN_MONTHS, 
 OLD_ADJUSTED_COST, 
 ORIGINAL_COST, 
 ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE, 
 PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE, 
 PRODUCTION_CAPACITY, 
 PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE, 
 PRORATE_DATE, 
 RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR, 
 RECOVERABLE_COST, 
 REMAINING_LIFE1, 
 REMAINING_LIFE2, 
 RETIREMENT_ID, 
 RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG, 
 REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS, 
 (case when REVAL_CEILING>9999999999999999999.9999999 then 0 else REVAL_CEILING end) as REVAL_CEILING , 
 SALVAGE_VALUE, 
 SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG, 
 TAX_REQUEST_ID, 
 TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN, 
 TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT, 
 UNIT_OF_MEASURE, 
 UNREVALUED_COST 
FROM
 MF_FA_BOOKS
WHERE  GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
UNION
SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(A,8) */
ADJUSTED_CAPACITY, 
 ADJUSTED_COST, 
 ADJUSTED_RATE, 
 ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST, 
 ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS, 
 ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT, 
 ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT, 
 ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG, 
 ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG, 
 A.ASSET_ID, 
 BASIC_RATE, 
 BONUS_RULE, 
 A.BOOK_TYPE_CODE, 
 CAPITALIZE_FLAG, 
 CEILING_NAME, 
 CONVERSION_DATE, 
 COST, 
 COST_CHANGE_FLAG, 
 A.DATE_EFFECTIVE, 
 DATE_INEFFECTIVE, 
 DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE, 
 DEPRECIATE_FLAG, 
 DEPRN_METHOD_CODE, 
 DEPRN_START_DATE, 
 EOFY_ADJ_COST, 
 EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR, 
 FORMULA_FACTOR, 
 FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER, 
 A.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
 GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
 A.GLOBAL_NAME, 
 GROUP_ASSET_ID, 
 IDLED_FLAG, 
 ITC_AMOUNT, 
 ITC_AMOUNT_ID, 
 ITC_BASIS, 
 A.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
 A.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 A.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
 LIFE_IN_MONTHS, 
 OLD_ADJUSTED_COST, 
 ORIGINAL_COST, 
 ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE, 
 PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED, 
 PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE, 
 PRODUCTION_CAPACITY, 
 PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE, 
 PRORATE_DATE, 
 RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR, 
 RECOVERABLE_COST, 
 REMAINING_LIFE1, 
 REMAINING_LIFE2, 
 RETIREMENT_ID, 
 RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG, 
 REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS, 
 (case when REVAL_CEILING>9999999999999999999.9999999 then 0 else REVAL_CEILING end) as REVAL_CEILING , 
 SALVAGE_VALUE, 
 SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG, 
 TAX_REQUEST_ID, 
 TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN, 
 TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT, 
 UNIT_OF_MEASURE, 
 UNREVALUED_COST 
FROM
 MF_FA_BOOKS A, MF_FA_TXN_HEADERS B
WHERE  B.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
AND A.ASSET_ID = B.ASSET_ID
AND A.GLOBAL_NAME = B.GLOBAL_NAME
